name: mah-platform
description: Mahardika Platform - Complete monorepo with UI library and applications

scripts.test: pnpm run --filter='./packages/*' test && pnpm run test:scripts
scripts.lint: pnpm run --filter='./packages/*' lint && pnpm run --filter='./apps/*' lint
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm run --filter='./packages/*' lint:fix && pnpm run --filter='./apps/*' lint:fix
scripts.security:scan: git log --all -p | grep -i 'api_key\|secret\|password\|token' || echo 'No secrets found'
scripts.pre-commit: pnpm run check-brand && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run security:check && pnpm run build && pnpm run test

author: Mahardika Team
